name: openclaw-20260316
description: OpenClaw-inspired brain with Markdown-canonical storage, hybrid search (vector + BM25 keyword), pre-compaction memory flush, graceful degradation, and self-improvement feedback loop.

working.description: Hot state: curated memory (MEMORY.md) + daily logs (memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md). Markdown is canonical source of truth.

knowledge.description: Persistent knowledge with hybrid search index. Lessons stored as JSONL (canonical), indexed via BM25 + vector embeddings.

episodic.description: Long-term memory: personality (SOUL.md), accumulated memory (MEMORY.md), daily session logs with Ebbinghaus-inspired decay.

pre_compaction_flush.description: Before context window compaction, prompt agent to save important memories.
pre_compaction_flush.prompt: Pre-compaction memory flush. Store durable memories now (use BRAIN log, SKILLS learn). If nothing to store, continue.

action.message: 10 new lessons accumulated. Run: BRAIN digest

procedural_skills._description: ProcMEM-inspired reflex arcs. Each skill has activation conditions (when), execution procedure (what to do), and termination conditions (when done). The hook system matches agent actions against activation patterns and injects the relevant procedure.
procedural_skills._reference: ProcMEM (Mi et al., ICML 2026): Skill = <activation, execution, termination>

activation.description: Agent creates or writes a file in the project root directory

execution: Check: .gitignore uses deny-all (/*). Root files need explicit whitelisting.
Add !/filename to GitIgnoreManager.base_patterns in logic/git/manager.py
Do NOT only edit .gitignore manually — it is auto-regenerated on tool install.
Reference: AGENT.md Section 9 (Auto-Generated .gitignore)

activation.description: Agent creates directories under a tool

execution: Verify symmetric pattern: logic/, interface/, hooks/, data/, test/
Check template at logic/tool/template/ for required files
data/ and logs/ are gitignored. runtime/ is tracked.
Ensure AGENT.md, AGENT_REFLECTION.md, README.md exist

activation.description: Agent writes a cross-tool or cross-module import

execution: Import from interface.*, never from logic.* directly
If needed functionality isn't in interface/main.py, add it there first
Run: TOOL --audit imports to verify compliance
Brain commands (BRAIN log, reflect) are ecosystem-level — work with any blueprint
Blueprint-specific behaviors go in logic/brain/blueprint/<name>/blueprint.json
Never hardcode brain paths; use BrainSessionManager for instance resolution
Brain instances live in logic/brain/instance/<name>/
skills.termination: paths resolved via BrainSessionManager, not hardcoded

execution: README.md: Stable overview only. No tool lists, model names, or volatile inventories.
AGENT.md: Operational guide. Technical details agents need.
AGENT_REFLECTION.md: Stable protocol, NOT recording file. Refined not grown.
Each directory should have all three. Check doc symmetry.
skills.termination: documentation updated within its designated scope

activation.description: Agent updates root conventions or templates

execution: Check: does logic/tool/template/ propagate this convention?
Root rules that don't cascade to templates are silently ignored by new tools
If changing how an existing file type is used, batch-update existing instances
Use a tmp/ Python script for bulk updates across 80+ tools
skills.termination: template and existing instances reflect the updated convention

features.markdown_canonical: All memory stored as plain Markdown files — human-readable, editable, version-controllable. Index is derived, files are source of truth.
features.hybrid_search: Union-based hybrid search: 70% vector similarity + 30% BM25 keyword matching. Over-fetches 4x candidates before merge.
features.pre_compaction_flush: Before context overflow, agent is prompted to save important memories. Prevents information loss during compaction.
features.graceful_degradation: If embeddings fail, keyword search still works. If keyword search fails, vector search still works. Either can fail independently.
features.local_first: Prefers local embedding models, falls back to cloud providers. Works fully offline with local models.
features.ebbinghaus_decay: Old memories are gradually deprioritized using exponential decay, but never deleted. High-value categories exempt from decay.
features.self_improvement_loop: Captures failures/corrections → detects patterns → proposes improvements. Human-in-the-loop for skill changes.
features.procedural_reflex_arcs: ProcMEM-inspired skills with activation/execution/termination. Hook system matches agent actions against patterns and injects relevant procedures automatically.

dependencies.note: Core functionality works with flatfile only. Optional: install sentence-transformers for hybrid search embeddings.
